extraction.description: This screenshot shows the UiPath process Monitoring view with a workflow diagram and heatmap overlay enabled. The process visualizes an invoice matching flow with steps for retrieving invoice and PO data, comparing documents, manual review and validation, reviewer decision, sending rejection email, and updating financial systems. Colored heatmap intensity is strongest around the Manual Review and Validation activity, indicating concentrated activity there.
extraction.step_instructions: Informational screenshot — no user action required. It shows the Monitoring tab of the UiPath process with heatmap visualization enabled, highlighting execution/activity counts across the invoice matching workflow.
